title: IDOR in Profile Page
vulnerable_behavior: A normal user can modify the profile id query parameter and view another user's profile data in the vulnerable app.
secure_behavior: The secure app blocks normal users from accessing another user's profile unless they are an admin.
evidence_note: Log in as alice and compare /profile?id=3 in both applications.
root_cause: The vulnerable app trusts the user-controlled id parameter without checking object-level authorization.
impact: A user could view data belonging to another account if similar logic existed in a real application.
remediation: Enforce object-level access checks on the server side before returning profile data.
retest_notes: Retest confirmed that the secure app returns 403 Forbidden for unauthorized profile access.
